Normalization technique used for DATA 2: Yields
relative to 148Nd were calculated for each mass chain
between mass 116 and 160 for each of the capsules. An
inverse variance weighted average of the relative
yield for each mass chain then was used for the
normalization. Estimated yields of Ferguson and

The fission yields were calculated based on a 100%
normalization of the relative fission yields in the
heavy mass peak. Over 80% of the yields in the heavy
mass peak had been experimentally measured to about
1% relative uncertainty. Relative yields in mass region
117-159 were calculated for three capsules and these
values then were weighted as the inverse variance to
obtain the average. The estimated relative yields that
were assigned a relative uncertainty of +-20% were
taken from the compilation of Meek and Rider,
